title: cyperus ovularis var. wolfii
intro: Cyperus ovularis var. wolfii, also known as Wolf's sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Wolf's sedge has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus ovularis var. wolfii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wolf's sedge can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and aid in the recovery from illnesses.
